items.title: Russian attacks kill six in Ukraine, officials say
items.summary: The deaths were reported in four south-eastern Ukrainian regions in the past 24 hours.

items.title: Kenyans fighting illegally for Russia in Ukraine to be granted amnesty
items.summary: It is illegal for Kenyans to serve in foreign armies and can carry a sentence of up to 10 years in jail.

items.title: Selon ChatGPT, le visage parfait est… blanc
items.summary: Les robots conversationnels sont-ils racistes ? Selon eux, le visage idéal serait celui d’une femme blanche, jeune et souriante. Face aux données stéréotypées utilisées par l’intelligence artificielle, les outils de régulation tardent à venir.

items.title: Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and properties
items.summary: The violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike.

items.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist airport security as DHS shutdown continues
items.summary: Travellers have faced hours-long waits at airports around the country as a partial government shutdown has left TSA agents without pay.

items.title: National blackout hits Cuba for second time in a week

items.summary: Crimson Desert developer Pearl Abyss has launched a “comprehensive” audit of all in-game assets after admitting the use of AI-generated images in the final release should have been disclosed.

items.title: 'We cannot be in peace', say Guthrie family as they renew appeal over missing mother
items.summary: A seven-week nationwide search for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of TV anchor Savannah Guthrie has not identified any suspects.

items.title: Daredevil Has a New 'Blackout' Suit in Born Again Season 2, and There’s a Very Specific Reason for It
items.summary: Matt Murdock – aka Daredevil! – is back for Season 2 of Daredevil: Born Again, but he’s sporting a new look this time around… a costume the show’s producers are calling the "blackout" suit.

items.title: Sudan drone attack on key hospital killed 64 people during Eid, WHO says
items.summary: The strike killed 64 people, including 13 children, two nurses and a doctor, according to the WHO head.

items.title: Screamer Review
items.summary: Tedious characters and difficulty spikes notwithstanding, Screamer is a unique and confidently assembled racer that feels like the result of locking Blur in a room for 12 months with nothing but a Crunchyroll subscription.

items.title: « La valeur de l’ingénieur ou de consultant se mesure désormais moins en heures travaillées que dans sa maîtrise des systèmes d’IA »
items.summary: L’essor de l’intelligence artificielle bouleverse ce qui fonde la logique contractuelle entre les acteurs économiques : le rapport au temps. Au risque d’assister au décrochage des pays soucieux de préserver les protections sociales actuelles, prévient l’entrepreneur Sami Mahroum, dans une tribune au « Monde ».

items.title: BBC in Cuba as island plunged into darkness
items.summary: More than 10 million people are enduring power cuts after Cuba's national electrical grid collapsed again.

items.title: Socialists battle to hold Paris as France holds mayoral elections
items.summary: The capital could shift to the right after 25 years under the Socialists if Rachida Dati defeats Emmanuel Grégoire.

items.title: « La Commission européenne doit déterminer si les plateformes numériques ont créé un biais dangereux pour la démocratie »
items.summary: Le cercle de réflexion finlandais Sitra a mené une étude montrant que les jeunes internautes sont soumis à davantage de contenus de droite et d’extrême droite en ligne, peu importent leurs opinions politiques. Ilkka Rasanen, directeur des programmes de Sitra, prône, dans un entretien au « Monde », une intervention de l’Europe.

items.summary: Après les SMS, les messageries comme WhatsApp se sont largement imposées dans les communications privées des Français. Malgré tout, certains internautes sont restés fidèles au courriel, attachés à l’écriture longue, et à la profondeur de telles correspondances.
